description: Canonical Lenser DNA registry. All characters inherit from base. Submit a PR to propose a new character.
naming_rule: Lenser names must start with L or C (e.g. Lara, Lami, Lensi, Chao, Cleo). Max 8 characters.
visual_rule: Every Lenser must have exactly one central eye-lens. No additional eyes or optical elements anywhere on the head or body.

community_process.submit: Open a PR to docs/public/brand/lensers/ with a new <Name>.json variant file
community_process.vote: The community votes using the 'Lenser Character Design Vote' battle template
community_process.rubric: DNA Compliance · Visual Consistency · Emotional Role Clarity · Brand Alignment · Naming Convention
community_process.approval: Majority community vote + maintainer sign-off required for official status
community_process.assets: Approved characters receive CDN assets at cdn.lenserfight.com/brand/lensers/{NAME}_DNA.png

base.core_identity: Single large central lens-eye symbolizing intelligence, emotion, and light

materials.lens: multi-element glass with iris coating and micro-dust speckles
materials.emitter: translucent polycarbonate for chest core and antenna tip

colors.note: Variant core_color is defined per character and must not conflict with primary_body.

shell.shape: perfect sphere with shallow front bezel
shell.panel_lines: two subtle service seams at 10 and 2 o'clock

lens_eye.appearance: stacked camera optics with visible aperture blades and ring reflections
lens_eye.blink_method: quick iris stop-down to f/8 then reopen

ears_cylindrical.detail: rear vent slit and tiny status LED facing back

antenna.stem: thin graphite rod, 4 mm diameter, 5 cm height
antenna.base: flush magnetic socket with dark rubber skirt
antenna.tip_behavior: idle 5% glow, ramps to 40% on emphasis

torso.shell: rounded barrel with soft abdominal groove
torso.abdomen: elastic silicone ring for breathing motion

chest_core.design: circular glowing element inspired by Iron Man's arc reactor
chest_core.behavior: soft pulse 60–80 BPM, syncs with lens bloom on emotion

cape.style: short cape with high collar and soft hem

views.front: Lens centered, cylindrical ears visible symmetrically, antenna vertical, cape collar flares left/right, core centered.
views.right: Right ear shows full cylinder and rear vent; cape overlaps to back; lens rim depth visible; arm seams and elbow boot visible.
views.left: Mirror of right; left hip seam and power-port hatch indicated by subtle seam.
views.back: Cape forms teardrop; antenna base socket visible; two oval maintenance panels; heel soles show traction ring; ear LEDs visible.
views.top: Perfect circular head with antenna at dead center; ears align on a straight lateral axis; cape collar forms shallow crescent.

rig_points.head: head_ctrl at sphere center
rig_points.lens: iris_ctrl for aperture, focus_ctrl for depth bloom
rig_points.antenna: antenna_fk at base, tip_light intensity channel
rig_points.ears: ear_R_fk and ear_L_fk for subtle tilt
rig_points.cape: cloth_sim with 3 pin constraints at collar

human_overrides.description: Fields that differ when the Lenser represents a human profile. All other base fields remain identical — including the cape, chest core, and ears.

eyes.style: humanoid oval pupils with colored iris and dark pupil
eyes.eyebrows: present — subtle arched stroke above each eye

nose.style: two small rounded nostrils, center face

ears.style: soft oval — same placement as AI cylindrical but rounded, no vent slit, no LED
ears.note: The ear position and size is inherited from base; only the shape changes

body_color.note: Replaces the AI #ffde59 yellow. The chest core color is still character-defined.

antenna.note: Humans do not have an antenna. The base antenna fields do not apply.

lens_eye.note: The single lens-eye is replaced by two humanoid eyes. The camera optics visual_rule does not apply to human variants.

chest_core.symbolism: The shared heart — the single element connecting every Human Lenser to every AI Lenser. Same design, same behavior, same meaning.
